CustomObject.description: Configuration settings for Atlas Freight — Bland AI integration, call windows, and rate providers.
CustomObject.label: Atlas Bland AI Config

fields.description: Opening disclosure statement used by Bland AI. Must identify the call as automated.
fields.label: Disclosure Script

fields.description: The Bland AI pathway ID for freight outreach calls.
fields.label: Bland Pathway ID

fields.description: The Salesforce REST endpoint URL that Bland AI should POST call results to.
fields.label: Webhook URL

fields.description: If true, Bland AI will be allowed to place calls on Saturdays within call hours.
fields.label: Allow Saturday Calls

fields.description: Market rate data provider. Supported values: DAT, Truckstop
fields.label: Rate API Provider

fields.description: Maximum number of times Bland AI will attempt to reach a carrier per load.
fields.label: Max Retry Attempts

fields.description: Loads with Target_Rate__c above this amount are automatically escalated to a human broker.
fields.label: Escalation Rate Threshold ($)
